hero.subtext: momento.motion is an Afro House, Tech House and House music initiative, event organiser, and production company creating immersive sound-led experiences through curated DJ journeys, resident artists, B2B collaborations, and hand-selected talent.

facts.label: FORMAT
facts.value: Music initiative / event organiser / production company

facts.label: ARTISTS
facts.value: Resident DJ, B2B collaborations, emerging artists, guest performers

facts.label: COMPANY
facts.value: W8V LTD - created by SVG Group Limited

about.heading: About momento.motion
body: momento.motion is a music-first event platform focused on Afro House, Tech House and House.
The initiative brings together resident DJs, emerging artists, guest performers, and curated B2B sets to create events that feel like emotional journeys rather than ordinary nights out.
With a refined approach to sound, atmosphere, and production, momento.motion is building a new space for Afro House culture and music-led connection.

founder.heading: Who founded momento
body: Meet Harry, a 20 year old who realised events and nightlife wasn't what it could be.
Momento is about bringing back the culture to events and reimagining London nightlife.
Creating a space for the people who are here for the music. It doesn't matter who you are, what car you drive, what clothes you wear. Music is for everyone.

philosophy.heading: We create moments through music
body: At the core of momento.motion is the belief that sound can shape emotion, memory, movement, and connection.

Every event is built as a journey, where rhythm and energy are carefully mapped to carry the room from atmosphere to intensity, from tension to release, from individual presence to collective experience.

pillars.title: Sound Direction
body: Rooted in Afro House, Tech House and House - deep percussion, hypnotic rhythm, warm grooves, and melodic tension, built for people who experience music fully.

pillars.title: Artist Curation / B2B Format
body: A resident artist anchors the sound, alongside hand-selected emerging DJs, B2B collaborations, and occasional special guests, meeting and building a shared journey in real time.

pillars.title: Production
body: momento.motion also operates as a production company - sound direction, artist curation, atmosphere, and event production, built with intention and emotional impact.

team.name: David Wong
team.bio: Co-founder and resident DJ, shaping the sound and energy of every momento.motion night.

team.name: Harry Reuben-Hunting
team.bio: Co-founder and resident DJ, driving the direction and feel of the dancefloor.

team.name: Gabriel Bandman
team.bio: Leads marketing and audience growth, bringing momento.motion's story to new rooms and cities.

team.name: Aleksandra Slahova
team.bio: Shapes the visual language - motion, grain, light, and brand worlds.

contact.body: For bookings, partnerships, artist submissions, press, production enquiries, and collaborations, please contact the momento.motion team.
